caption: A man wearing a gray t-shirt and a gray baseball cap with a red and white logo sits in a recording studio against a dark, textured acoustic wall. He wears large black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone held by a shock mount. The microphone arm features the legible text "Shure SM7B". Throughout the sequence, the man is seen gesturing with his right hand as he speaks. In the initial frames, his hand moves across the left side of the frame, while in the later frames, he points his finger and shifts his arm, briefly revealing a tattoo on his upper right arm. The camera remains in a steady medium close-up shot, focusing on the man's head and shoulders, with the equipment positioned between him and the lens.
